query: SELECT ticker, COUNT(*) as trades, SUM(CASE WHEN realizedPnl > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as wins, ROUND(AVG(realizedPnlPct),2) as avgPnlPct, ROUND(SUM(realizedPnl),0) as totalPnl, exitReason FROM labTrades WHERE simulationId = 810001 GROUP BY ticker, exitReason ORDER BY totalPnl DESC LIMIT 20;
